text: Why is this never an actual option in real life?
why don't they do them.for adults? ive suffered all my life
game changer 🙌 I didn't think k mine worked caused a flare but wow then I could do shit
Is this only available for teenagers?!

Can you advise where we can access this treatment, I will pay privately. My 15 year old has endo, adeno and adhesions diagnosed by mri and ultrasound. Other that codeine, no. Other treatment had been forthcoming from our health authority.

hmmm I was offered a nerve block for endo and adeno pain but refused it... I was afraid..... the nerve block doesn't stop the disease so is this not dangerous.. surely it could cause the disease to get worse without you feeling it... the damage that could do 😳😳😳
